instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Why Should You Buy Critical Illness Cover Even after Buying Term Insurance?
Meta Description: A unique financial protection plan known as the 'Critical Illness Plan' can help to alleviate this financial load. You should buy a critical illness plan in addition to a term insurance policy.
Keywords: term insurance, critical illness cover, critical illness insurance
_____________________________________________________________________________________
When it comes to insurance in India, a term insurance plan is a popular and much sought after product. Most individuals prefer it to a normal life insurance plan because it provides a bigger sum assured. However, if your term plan includes add-on insurance, your life will be made easier. When we say add-on cover, we mean riders that provide additional protection. A rider is either included in your term insurance policy or must be purchased separately. You can choose the ideal rider who suits your needs based on your needs.
Riders can be of many forms depending on your plan, but when it comes to a term plan, a critical illness cover is essential. Why? Let us go over this in more depth.
What Is Critical Illness Insurance?
When purchasing a term insurance policy, the critical illness rider becomes mandatory. A critical illness rider gives additional financial support during a medical emergency. A serious sickness can strike without warning, thus having a rider on hand comes in handy in emergency situations.
Working Of Critical Insurance Plan
The operation of CI plans differs from those of conventional insurance policies. When a serious illness is diagnosed, the policyholder receives the whole sum insured. If seized by the insured, the money covered can be utilised for treatment, care costs, and even debt repayment. Because the payout is defined and set, CI plans are also known as defined benefit plans. If an insured has more than one CI policy from different insurers, all of them will pay the full sum insured.
Why You Need A Critical Illness Rider
The policyholder does not need to pay any extra money because the premium remains the same.
It serves as a source of income replacement.
You can get a double tax break with this add-on.
It gives you additional coverage for medical and day-to-day needs.
How Critical Illness Rider Functions
If the insured person is diagnosed with one of the critical illnesses that are covered by the policy, then they will be given a lump sum payment under this rider. According to the terms and conditions of the insurance policy, the coverage for the critical illness that was discovered may either continue or expire. As a consequence of this, it is absolutely necessary to examine the coverage in great detail before choosing a ride. A significant number of insurance companies are working on innovative critical illness riders that take into account lifestyle conditions as well. Aside from that, the covered person is eligible to get reimbursement for hospitalisation costs as well as expenses that are not related to hospitalisation.
Things To Think About When Purchasing A Critical Illness Rider
Sections 80 C and 80D of the Income Tax Act allow you to save money on taxes.
If the term plan's maximum tenure is 30 years, coverage remains even after the benefit is claimed.
The total sum assured amount set under the plan is payable in the event of the insured's death or total permanent incapacity.
The benefit amount payable is equal to the critical illness insurance selected by the policyholder.
The claim can be resolved within 21 days of receiving all required papers.
There is no minimum surviving duration, and the compensation is provided immediately upon diagnosis.
The insurance customer can easily obtain the coverage online by paying premiums in instalments.
How Can You Know Which One Is Ideal For You?
This choice must be made based on what is most important to you.
If adequate coverage is a top priority: If you want a more solid cover, consider purchasing a standalone critical illness policy. It may be more expensive and may necessitate additional documentation and medical reports, but you will receive a more complete insurance that will protect your family from the financial danger of major diseases more efficiently.
If price and convenience are important considerations: If you want to obtain critical illness coverage with minimum effort and at a fixed rate for several years, consider adding a critical illness rider to your term insurance policy.
Sources:
https://securenow.in/insuropedia/why-should-you-buy-critical-illness-cover-even-buying-term-health-insurance/?category=608

output.final_text:
Why Should You Buy Critical Illness Cover Even after Buying Term Insurance? When it comes to insurance in India, a term insurance plan is popular and one of the most sought-after product. Most individuals prefer it over a normal life insurance plan because it provides a high sum assured. Further, if your term plan includes an add-on insurance cover like riders that provide additional protection, your life will be made easier. The base insurance plan comes with an optional rider, which can be opted, by paying extra nominal premium. You can choose the suitable rider which fulfils your needs. Riders can be of many forms depending on your plan, but when it comes to a term plan, a critical illness cover is significant. Why? Let us go over this in more depth. What Is Critical Illness Insurance Rider? When purchasing a term insurance policy, one has an option to choose riders, among which one such rider is - the critical illness rider. A critical illness rider gives additional financial support during a medical emergency. A serious sickness can strike without warning, thus having a rider comes in handy in emergencies. A rider can be availed by paying extra nominal premium. Working Of Critical Illness Insurance Rider The operation of Critical Illness Rider differs from those of conventional insurance policies. When a serious illness is diagnosed, the policyholder receives the sum insured, provided it fulfils the terms and conditions specified in the rider and all due premiums are paid. This amount can be utilised to cover treatment care costs. A critical illness rider helps in gaining enhanced cover against the critical illnesses covered under the rider. How Critical Illness Rider Functions If the insured person is diagnosed with one of the critical illnesses that are covered by the rider, then they will be given a lump sum payment under this rider as per rider terms & conditions. According to the terms and conditions of the rider, the coverage for the critical illness that was discovered may either continue or expire. As a consequence of this, it is absolutely necessary to examine the coverage in detail before choosing a rider. A significant number of insurance companies are working on innovative critical illness riders that take into account lifestyle conditions as well. Why Should You buy Critical Illness Rider with Your Term Plan?? This choice must be made based on what is most important to you.
● If adequate coverage is a top priority: If you want better protection, you might want to buy a separate critical illness rider. It may cost more and require more paperwork and medical reports, but you will get a comprehensive cover that will protect your family better from the financial risk of major illnesses.
● If price and convenience are important considerations: Add a critical illness rider to your term insurance policy if you want to get coverage for a critical illness at a fixed rate for several years, on payment of nominal extra cost.
